languages.text: Whenever the wearer blocks an attack, all adjacent creatures must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or suffer +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g}. Base armour property: +10% {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} against ranged attacks.

languages.text:
Whenever wielder Blocks, all adjacent units must succeed at Toughness (+0) test or gain 1 stack of Perplexed
Base Armour Property: +10% Armour against ranged attacks

languages.text: "Kullanan kişi bir saldırıyı blokladığında bitişikteki tüm yaratıklar, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Dayanıklılık{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. Aksi takdirde +1 {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}şaşkınlık{/g} birikimine maruz kalırlar. Taban {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}zırh{/g} özelliği: Menzilli saldırılara karşı +%10 zırh."
languages.original_text: Whenever the wielder blocks an attack, all adjacent creatures must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or suffer +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g}. Base {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} property: +10% armour against ranged attacks.

traits.locale_text: Kullanan kişi bir saldırıyı blokladığında bitişikteki tüm yaratıklar, İrade direnç testinden geçmelidir. Aksi takdirde +1 şaşkınlık birikimine maruz kalırlar. Taban zırhı özelliği: Menzilli saldırılara karşı +%10 zırh.

Kullanan kişi bir saldırıyı blokladığında bitişikteki tüm yaratıklar, İrade {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. Aksi takdirde +1 şaşkınlık birikimine maruz kalırlar. Taban {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}zırhı{/g} özelliği: Menzilli saldırılara karşı +%10 zırh.

Kullanan kişi bir saldırıyı blokladığında bitişikteki tüm yaratıklar, İrade {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. Aksi takdirde +1 {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}şaşkınlık{/g} birikimine maruz kalırlar. Taban {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}zırhı{/g} özelliği: Menzilli saldırılara karşı +%10 zırh.

languages.text: Cada vez que el portador bloquee un ataque, todas las criaturas adyacentes deben superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Resistencia{/g} para no sufrir +1 acumulación de {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplejo{/g}. Propiedad básica de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armadura{/g}: +10 % de armadura contra ataques a distancia.
languages.original_text: Whenever the wielder blocks an attack, all adjacent creatures must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or suffer +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g}. Base {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} property: +10% armour against ranged attacks.

traits.locale_text: Cada vez que el portador bloquee un ataque, todas las criaturas adyacentes deben superar una prueba de fortaleza de Resistencia para no sufrir +1 acumulación de perplejo. Propiedad básica de armadura: +10 % de armadura contra ataques a distancia.

Cada vez que el portador bloquee un ataque, todas las criaturas adyacentes deben superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Resistencia{/g} para no sufrir +1 acumulación de {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplejo{/g}. Propiedad básica de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armadura{/g}: +10 % de armadura contra ataques a distancia.

languages.text: 每当装备者格挡攻击时，所有邻近生物都需要进行{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}坚韧{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}，若未能通过检定，则会获得1层“{g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}困惑{/g}”效果。 基础{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}护甲{/g}特性：对抗远程攻击时，获得+10%护甲。
languages.original_text: Whenever the wielder blocks an attack, all adjacent creatures must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or suffer +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g}. Base {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} property: +10% armour against ranged attacks.

traits.locale_text: 每当装备者格挡攻击时，所有邻近生物都需要进行坚韧抗性检定，若未能通过检定，则会获得1层“困惑”效果。 基础护甲特性：对抗远程攻击时，获得+10%护甲。

每当装备者格挡攻击时，所有邻近生物都需要进行{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}坚韧{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}，若未能通过检定，则会获得1层“{g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}困惑{/g}”效果。 基础{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}护甲{/g}特性：对抗远程攻击时，获得+10%护甲。

languages.text: Quand l'utilisateur bloque une attaque, toutes les créatures adjacentes doivent réussir un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Endurance{/g}, sans quoi elles reçoivent +1 cumul de {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}Perplexité{/g}. Propriété d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armure{/g} de base : +10 % à l'Armure contre les attaques à distance.
languages.original_text: Whenever the wielder blocks an attack, all adjacent creatures must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or suffer +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g}. Base {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} property: +10% armour against ranged attacks.

traits.locale_text: Quand l'utilisateur bloque une attaque, toutes les créatures adjacentes doivent réussir un test de résistance d'Endurance, sans quoi elles reçoivent +1 cumul de Perplexité. Propriété d'armure de base : +10 % à l'Armure contre les attaques à distance.

languages.text: 使用者が攻撃をブロックすると、隣接するすべての生物は耐久力抵抗判定を受けなければならず、失敗すると+1スタックの混乱を受ける。 基本アーマー特性：範囲攻撃に対するアーマー+10%。
languages.original_text: Whenever the wielder blocks an attack, all adjacent creatures must pass a Toughness resistance test or suffer +1 stack of perplexed. Base armour property: +10% armour against ranged attacks.

traits.locale_text: 使用者が攻撃をブロックすると、隣接するすべての生物は耐久力抵抗判定を受けなければならず、失敗すると+1スタックの混乱を受ける。 基本アーマー特性：範囲攻撃に対するアーマー+10%。
使用者が攻撃をブロックすると、隣接するすべての生物は耐久力抵抗判定を受けなければならず、失敗すると+1スタックの混乱を受ける。 基本アーマー特性：範囲攻撃に対するアーマー+10%。

languages.text: Blockt der Träger einen Angriff, müssen alle benachbarten Kreaturen eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Zähigkeit{/g} bestehen, um nicht mit +1 Stapel "{g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}Überrascht{/g}" belegt zu werden. Grundeigenschaft Rüstung: +10 % {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Rüstung{/g} gegen Fernkampfangriffe.

languages.text: Когда персонаж блокирует атаку, все существа на соседних клетках выполняют проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Выносливости{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} и в случае провала получают +1 уровень {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}замешательства{/g}. Базовое свойство: +10% к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}броне{/g} против дистанционных атак.
